title: indulgent herbal syrian yogurt tart
description: a refreshing and tangy tart featuring a rich tandoor-spiced yogurt filling and a buttery phyllo crust, garnished with fragrant herbs and edible flowers.

ingredients.name: edible flowers (such as violas or pansies)

instructions: thaw the phyllo dough according to package instructions.
cut the phyllo into 4 equal pieces and place them in a baking dish.
melt the butter and brush it evenly over the phyllo pieces.
spread the tandoor-spiced yogurt over the phyllo pieces, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
sprinkle the chopped herbs and edible flowers over the yogurt.
drizzle the honey over the top.
bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown and the filling is set.
remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
serve warm, garnished with additional herbs and edible flowers if desired.
